content.json:
# SpyCloud SOC Operations Dashboard
**Security Operations Center** - Real-time threat monitoring, investigation tools, correlation analysis, and threat hunting capabilities powered by SpyCloud darknet intelligence.

> This workbook is designed for SOC analysts performing active investigations, threat hunting, and incident response using SpyCloud data correlated with Microsoft Sentinel.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.json:
## Live Threat Feed
Real-time exposure ingestion, active incidents, and playbook execution status for the current operational period.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)["New Exposures (24h)",0,1,"Critical Exposures",0,2,"Active Incidents",0,3,"Playbook Runs (24h)",0,4,"Pending Remediations",0,5]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="New Exposures (24h)", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Critical Exposures", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | where severity >= 20 | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Active Incidents", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(union (Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)), (SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Playbook Runs (24h)", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(let remediated = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | distinct user_principal_name_s;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | where severity >= 20 | where email !in (remediated) | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Pending Remediations", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Live Threat Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Exposures=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Real-Time Exposure Ingestion (Last 24 Hours - 15min bins)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let remediated = SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| distinct user_principal_name_s;
SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| where email !in (remediated)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), InfectedDevices=dcount(infected_machine_id), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend Priority = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "P1-CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "P2-HIGH", "P3-MEDIUM")
| order by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| take 30
| project Priority, User=email, Exposures, PlaintextPWs, InfectedDevices, LatestExposure)
content.title: Unresolved High-Severity Exposures Requiring Action

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="SpyCloud-MDE-Isolation", Target=device_name_s, Action=action_type_s, Status=status_s),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | project TimeGenerated, Playbook="SpyCloud-CA-Remediation", Target=user_principal_name_s, Action=action_s, Status=status_s)
| extend StatusIndicator = case(Status in ("Succeeded", "Success", "Completed"), "SUCCESS", Status in ("Failed", "Error"), "FAILED", "PENDING")
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
| project TimeGenerated, Playbook, Target, Action, StatusIndicator)
content.title: Recent Playbook Executions and Status

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), SeverityLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Exposure Ingestion by Severity (Last 24h - Hourly)

content.json:
## Investigation Hub
Parameter-driven entity lookup across all SpyCloud data sources and correlated Sentinel tables. Search by user, device, or IP address.

parameters.name: SearchUser
parameters.label: User Email (partial match)
parameters.description: Enter a full or partial email address to search across all SpyCloud tables

parameters.name: SearchDevice
parameters.label: Device ID or Hostname
parameters.description: Enter a device identifier or hostname to search

parameters.name: SearchIP
parameters.label: IP Address
parameters.description: Enter an IP address to search across all tables

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (isnotempty("{SearchUser}") and email has "{SearchUser}")
    or (isnotempty("{SearchDevice}") and (infected_machine_id has "{SearchDevice}" or user_hostname has "{SearchDevice}"))
    or (isnotempty("{SearchIP}") and ip_address has "{SearchIP}")
| project TimeGenerated, Source="BreachWatchlist", Email=email, Severity=severity, PasswordType=password_type, HasPlaintext=isnotempty(password_plaintext), Domain=target_domain, DeviceID=infected_machine_id, Hostname=user_hostname, IP=ip_address, SourceID=source_id
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100)
content.title: SpyCloud Breach Watchlist Results

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (isnotempty("{SearchUser}") and email has "{SearchUser}")
    or (isnotempty("{SearchDevice}") and (infected_machine_id has "{SearchDevice}" or user_hostname has "{SearchDevice}"))
    or (isnotempty("{SearchIP}") and ip_address has "{SearchIP}")
| project TimeGenerated, Source="CompassData", Email=email, Severity=severity, Domain=target_domain, DeviceID=infected_machine_id, Hostname=user_hostname, IP=ip_address, BreachCategory=breach_category
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100)
content.title: SpyCloud Compass Data Results

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachCatalog_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty("{SearchUser}") or isnotempty("{SearchDevice}") or isnotempty("{SearchIP}")
| join kind=inner (
    SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where (isnotempty("{SearchUser}") and email has "{SearchUser}")
        or (isnotempty("{SearchDevice}") and (infected_machine_id has "{SearchDevice}" or user_hostname has "{SearchDevice}"))
        or (isnotempty("{SearchIP}") and ip_address has "{SearchIP}")
    | distinct source_id
) on $left.catalog_id == $right.source_id
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by catalog_id
| project CatalogID=catalog_id, BreachTitle=breach_title, Status=breach_status, Category=tostring(breach_category), Description=breach_description
| take 25)
content.title: Related Breach Catalog Entries

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (isnotempty("{SearchDevice}") and (device_id_s has "{SearchDevice}" or device_name_s has "{SearchDevice}"))
| project TimeGenerated, Source="MDE_Logs", Device=device_name_s, DeviceId=device_id_s, Action=action_type_s, Status=status_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: MDE Remediation Actions for Entity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (isnotempty("{SearchUser}") and user_principal_name_s has "{SearchUser}")
| project TimeGenerated, Source="CA_Logs", User=user_principal_name_s, Action=action_s, Status=status_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50)
content.title: Conditional Access Actions for Entity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (isnotempty("{SearchUser}") and UserPrincipalName has "{SearchUser}")
    or (isnotempty("{SearchIP}") and IPAddress has "{SearchIP}")
| project TimeGenerated, User=UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location=strcat(tostring(LocationDetails.city), ", ", tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)), App=AppDisplayName, Status=case(ResultType == 0, "Success", "Failed"), RiskLevel=RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ConditionalAccessStatus
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 75)
content.title: Related Sign-In Activity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where (isnotempty("{SearchIP}") and (SourceIP has "{SearchIP}" or DestinationIP has "{SearchIP}"))
| project TimeGenerated, SourceIP, DestinationIP, DestinationPort, Protocol=ApplicationProtocol, Action=DeviceAction, Vendor=DeviceVendor, Product=DeviceProduct, Message=Activity
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 75)
content.title: Related Firewall / Network Events

content.json:
## Correlation Matrix
Cross-source correlation of SpyCloud exposure events with Microsoft Sentinel security data sources. Identify overlapping indicators across sign-in logs, Office activity, firewall events, and device telemetry.

content.title: Cross-Source Correlation Counts

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize MaxSev=max(severity), SpyCloudExposures=count() by email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers | project email)
| summarize SignIns=count(), FailedSignIns=countif(ResultType != 0), RiskySignIns=countif(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium")), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress) by UserPrincipalName
| join kind=inner (exposedUsers) on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.email
| project User=UserPrincipalName, SpyCloudSeverity=MaxSev, SpyCloudExposures, SignIns, FailedSignIns, RiskySignIns, DistinctIPs
| order by SpyCloudSeverity desc, RiskySignIns desc
| take 30)
content.title: SpyCloud Events Correlated with SigninLogs

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize MaxSev=max(severity), SpyCloudExposures=count() by email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers | project email)
| summarize OfficeEvents=count(), FileAccesses=countif(Operation has_any ("FileAccessed", "FileDownloaded", "FilePreviewed")), Modifications=countif(Operation has_any ("FileModified", "FileUploaded", "FileDeleted")), MailActions=countif(Operation has_any ("Send", "MailboxLogin", "MoveToDeletedItems")), DistinctOps=dcount(Operation) by UserId
| join kind=inner (exposedUsers) on $left.UserId == $right.email
| project User=UserId, SpyCloudSeverity=MaxSev, SpyCloudExposures, OfficeEvents, FileAccesses, Modifications, MailActions, DistinctOps
| order by SpyCloudSeverity desc, OfficeEvents desc
| take 30)
content.title: SpyCloud Events Correlated with OfficeActivity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let spycloudIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(ip_address)
| summarize MaxSev=max(severity), Exposures=count() by IP=tostring(ip_address);
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend MatchedIP = case(SourceIP in (spycloudIPs | project IP), SourceIP, DestinationIP in (spycloudIPs | project IP), DestinationIP, "")
| where isnotempty(MatchedIP)
| summarize FirewallHits=count(), Allowed=countif(DeviceAction has_any ("Allow", "Accept", "Pass")), Blocked=countif(DeviceAction has_any ("Block", "Deny", "Drop")), DistinctPorts=dcount(DestinationPort), Vendors=make_set(DeviceVendor) by MatchedIP
| join kind=inner (spycloudIPs) on $left.MatchedIP == $right.IP
| project IP=MatchedIP, SpyCloudSeverity=MaxSev, SpyCloudExposures=Exposures, FirewallHits, AllowedTraffic=Allowed, BlockedTraffic=Blocked, DistinctPorts, FirewallVendors=strcat_array(Vendors, ", ")
| order by SpyCloudSeverity desc, FirewallHits desc
| take 30)
content.title: SpyCloud Events Correlated with CommonSecurityLog

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| summarize MaxSev=max(severity), SpyCloudExposures=count() by email;
DeviceEvents
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AccountUpn in (exposedUsers | project email)
| summarize DeviceEvents=count(), DistinctActions=dcount(ActionType), DistinctDevices=dcount(DeviceName), SuspiciousActions=countif(ActionType has_any ("ProcessCreate", "RegistryValueSet", "PowershellCommand", "ScriptContent")) by AccountUpn
| join kind=inner (exposedUsers) on $left.AccountUpn == $right.email
| project User=AccountUpn, SpyCloudSeverity=MaxSev, SpyCloudExposures, DeviceEvents, DistinctActions, DistinctDevices, SuspiciousActions
| order by SpyCloudSeverity desc, SuspiciousActions desc
| take 30)
content.title: SpyCloud Events Correlated with DeviceEvents
Cross-Source Correlation Heat Map (Daily Event Overlap)

content.json:
## Hunting Dashboard
Pre-built threat hunting queries, anomaly detection outputs, suspicious pattern identification, and investigation bookmarks for proactive threat discovery.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where isnotempty(password_plaintext) and severity >= 20
| join kind=inner (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where ResultType == 0
    | summarize SuccessfulSignIns=count(), LastSignIn=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
) on $left.email == $right.UserPrincipalName
| summarize PlaintextExposures=count(), BreachSources=dcount(source_id), MaxSev=max(severity) by email, SuccessfulSignIns, LastSignIn
| where SuccessfulSignIns > 0
| extend HuntFinding="HUNT-001: Plaintext Password Exposed + Active Sign-Ins"
| order by MaxSev desc, PlaintextExposures desc
| take 25
| project Finding=HuntFinding, User=email, PlaintextExposures, BreachSources, RecentSuccessfulSignIns=SuccessfulSignIns, LastSignIn)
content.title: HUNT-001: Users with Plaintext Passwords Still Signing In

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(infected_machine_id) and severity >= 20
| distinct infected_machine_id, email
| join kind=inner (
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
    | where ResultType == 0
    | extend isMultiGeo = bag_keys(LocationDetails) contains "city"
    | summarize DistinctLocations=dcount(tostring(LocationDetails.city)), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), Locations=make_set(strcat(tostring(LocationDetails.city), ", ", tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)), 5) by UserPrincipalName
    | where DistinctLocations > 2
) on $left.email == $right.UserPrincipalName
| project Finding="HUNT-002: Infected Device User + Multi-Location Sign-Ins", User=email, DeviceID=infected_machine_id, DistinctLocations, DistinctIPs, SampleLocations=strcat_array(Locations, " | ")
| take 25)
content.title: HUNT-002: Infected Device Users with Multi-Location Sign-Ins

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| where Operation has_any ("New-InboxRule", "Set-InboxRule", "UpdateInboxRules", "New-TransportRule")
| project TimeGenerated, Finding="HUNT-003: Exposed User Creating Mail Rules", User=UserId, Operation, ClientIP, Parameters=tostring(Parameters)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30)
content.title: HUNT-003: Exposed Users Creating Suspicious Mail Rules

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserId in (exposedUsers)
| where Operation has_any ("FileDownloaded", "FileAccessed", "FileSyncDownloadedFull")
| summarize Downloads=count(), UniqueFiles=dcount(OfficeObjectId), DistinctIPs=dcount(ClientIP) by UserId, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where Downloads > 50
| extend Finding="HUNT-004: Bulk Download from Exposed Account"
| project Finding, User=UserId, TimeWindow=TimeGenerated, FilesDownloaded=Downloads, UniqueFiles, SourceIPs=DistinctIPs
| order by FilesDownloaded desc
| take 25)
content.title: HUNT-004: Bulk File Downloads from Exposed Accounts

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let spycloudIPs = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(ip_address) and severity >= 20
| distinct tostring(ip_address);
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where IPAddress in (spycloudIPs)
| summarize Users=make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10), SignInCount=count(), SuccessCount=countif(ResultType == 0), FailCount=countif(ResultType != 0) by IPAddress
| where array_length(Users) > 1
| extend Finding="HUNT-005: Multiple Accounts from Same Exposed IP"
| project Finding, IPAddress, UniqueUsers=array_length(Users), UserList=strcat_array(Users, ", "), TotalSignIns=SignInCount, Successful=SuccessCount, Failed=FailCount
| order by UniqueUsers desc
| take 25)
content.title: HUNT-005: Multiple Accounts Accessed from Same Exposed IP

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
BehaviorAnalytics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where InvestigationPriority > 5
| summarize MaxPriority=max(InvestigationPriority), AvgPriority=round(avg(InvestigationPriority), 1), AnomalyCount=count(), Activities=make_set(ActivityType, 5) by UserPrincipalName
| extend Finding="HUNT-006: High Anomaly Score from Exposed User"
| order by MaxPriority desc
| take 25
| project Finding, User=UserPrincipalName, MaxAnomalyScore=MaxPriority, AvgAnomalyScore=AvgPriority, AnomalyEvents=AnomalyCount, ActivityTypes=strcat_array(Activities, ", "))
content.title: HUNT-006: High UEBA Anomaly Scores for Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let exposedUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and severity >= 20
| distinct email;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where UserPrincipalName in (exposedUsers)
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("Azure Portal", "Microsoft Azure Management", "Azure Resource Manager", "Graph Explorer", "Azure DevOps")
| where ResultType == 0
| summarize AccessCount=count(), DistinctApps=make_set(AppDisplayName), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress), LastAccess=max(TimeGenerated) by UserPrincipalName
| extend Finding="HUNT-007: Exposed User Accessing Privileged Azure Resources"
| project Finding, User=UserPrincipalName, AccessCount, Applications=strcat_array(DistinctApps, ", "), UniqueIPs=DistinctIPs, LastAccess
| order by AccessCount desc
| take 25)
content.title: HUNT-007: Exposed Users Accessing Privileged Azure Resources

content.json:
---
### Investigation Notes & Bookmarks
Use the query below to track investigation notes stored via Sentinel Bookmarks related to SpyCloud findings.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(HuntingBookmark
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Tags has "SpyCloud" or BookmarkName has "SpyCloud" or QueryText has "SpyCloud"
| project TimeGenerated, BookmarkName, CreatedBy=CreatedByName, Tags, Notes=Notes, QueryText=substring(QueryText, 0, 200)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 25)
content.title: SpyCloud-Related Investigation Bookmarks

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where severity >= 20
| summarize Exposures=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), Devices=dcount(infected_machine_id) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated desc)
content.title: Daily Anomaly Detection - Exposure Volume Spikes
